action.description: Use tumor histology, grade, stage, and ER PR HER2 expression to guide the decision to pursue neoadjuvant chemotherapy.
action.title: Use histology grade stage and receptor status to guide decisions

action.description: Do not use other immunochemical markers, morphologic markers, or genomic profiles to decide whether to pursue neoadjuvant chemotherapy.
action.title: Do not rely on other biomarkers or genomic profiles for neoadjuvant decision-making

action.description: Initial multidisciplinary treatment planning for invasive nonmetastatic breast cancer.

documentation.citation: Tumor histology, grade, stage, and ER PR HER2 expression should guide neoadjuvant decisions; other markers and genomic profiles should not.
